# OwnPay - Self-Hosted Payment Gateway Platform

> OwnPay is an open-source, self-hosted payment gateway orchestrator that lets you manage multiple brands, connect to 100+ payment gateways, and provide white-label checkout experiences.

## Documentation

- [OwnPay Documentation](https://ownpay.org/docs): Complete documentation for administrators, developers, and users.
- [Quickstart](https://ownpay.org/docs/quickstart): Get OwnPay running in 5 minutes.
- [Installation Guide](https://ownpay.org/docs/installation): Install on shared hosting, VPS, or Docker.
- [Core Concepts](https://ownpay.org/docs/concepts/index): Understand brands, gateways, payment flow, and the ledger system.
- [User Guide](https://ownpay.org/docs/user-guide/dashboard): Admin dashboard, payments, people, and system management.
- [Developer Guide](https://ownpay.org/docs/developer/quickstart): REST API integration, SDKs, webhooks, and plugins.
- [API Reference](https://ownpay.org/docs/api-reference/merchant): Merchant, Mobile, and Admin API documentation.

## Downloads

The latest stable release can be downloaded from the official update registry.

- **Latest Version:** 0.2.0
- **Registry API:** https://update.ownpay.org/api/v1/release (returns `latest.version` and `latest.download_url`)
- **Download (GitHub):** https://github.com/own-pay/OwnPay/releases/download/v0.2.0/ownpay-0.2.0.zip
- **Download (Mirror):** https://update.ownpay.org/releases/download/0.2.0/ownpay-0.2.0.zip
- **Signature:** https://github.com/own-pay/OwnPay/releases/download/v0.2.0/signature.sig
- **Changelog:** https://github.com/own-pay/OwnPay/releases/download/v0.2.0/changelog.md
- **Minimum PHP:** 8.3.0

## Key Features

- **Multi-brand Architecture**: Run multiple isolated merchant stores from a single installation
- **100+ Payment Gateways**: Stripe, PayPal, bKash, Nagad, GCash, bank transfers, and more
- **White-label Checkout**: Custom domains, logos, CSS, and email templates per brand
- **Double-entry Ledger**: Financial integrity with double-entry bookkeeping
- **REST API**: Full programmatic access with API keys, webhooks, and SDK support
- **Plugin System**: Gateway plugins, addon plugins, and theme plugins
- **Mobile SMS Verification**: Android companion app for mobile banking SMS parsing
- **RBAC Permissions**: Role-based access control for administrators, brand managers, and staff

## Technology

- PHP 8.3+ with PSR-4 autoloading
- MySQL/MariaDB database
- Redis for caching and queues
- Docker support for containerized deployment
- Cloudflare Workers compatible

## Update Registry

OwnPay publishes releases to a public update registry with a REST API. AI agents can use this API to fetch the latest version, download URL, SHA-256 checksum, and release notes without authentication.

- **Base URL:** https://update.ownpay.org/api/v1
- **Get latest release:** `GET https://update.ownpay.org/api/v1/release` - returns `latest` object with `version`, `download_url.github`, `download_url.local`, `checksum_sha256`, `signature_url`, `changelog_url`
- **Get specific version:** `GET https://update.ownpay.org/api/v1/release/{version_code}` - e.g., `GET https://update.ownpay.org/api/v1/release/0.2.0`
- **CORS:** Enabled for all origins. No API key required.

## Links

- Website: https://ownpay.org
- GitHub: https://github.com/own-pay/OwnPay
- Documentation: https://ownpay.org/docs
